levels.title: Add URL Path #1
levels.description: Complete the path call to map 'profile/' to the profile view.

levels.title: Return JSON Response #2
levels.description: Modify the view to return a JSON response instead of a plain string.

levels.title: Define Foreign Key #3
levels.description: Link the Post model to a User using a foreign key.

levels.title: Filter Active Users #4
levels.description: Update the query to only fetch users where is_active is True.

levels.title: Pass Data to Render #5
levels.description: Include the 'items' list in the context dictionary.

levels.title: Protect View #6
levels.description: Add the decorator to ensure only logged-in users can access this view.

levels.title: Validate Form #7
levels.description: Check if the submitted form data is valid before saving.

levels.description: Tell the serializer to include all fields.

levels.title: Initialize Middleware #9
levels.description: Store the get_response callable in the middleware.
